powers.name: Dexterity
powers.description: Dexterity improves Block gained from cards.

powers.name: Thorns
powers.description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back.

powers.description: Strength adds additional damage to Attacks.

powers.description: Strength adds additional damage to Attacks.

ascension_effects.name: Swarming Elites
ascension_effects.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] spawn more often.

ascension_effects.name: Weary Traveler
ascension_effects.description: Ancients only heal [blue]80%[/blue] of your missing HP.

ascension_effects.name: Poverty
ascension_effects.description: Enemies and Treasure Chests drop [blue]25%[/blue] less [gold]Gold[/gold].

ascension_effects.name: Tight Belt
ascension_effects.description: Start each run with 1 less potion slot.

ascension_effects.name: Ascender's Bane
ascension_effects.description: Start each run [red]Cursed[/red].

ascension_effects.name: Inflation
ascension_effects.description: Removing cards from your deck at the Merchant is more expensive.

relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain a random [gold]Rare Card[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: Juzu Bracelet
relics.description: Regular enemy combats are no longer encountered in [gold]?[/gold] rooms.

relics.name: The Boot
relics.description: Whenever you would deal [blue]4[/blue] or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to [blue]5[/blue].

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.

glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

relics.description: If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.

relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold]. Add an additional [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: Meat on the Bone
relics.description: If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

relics.name: Bag of Preparation
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Gambling Chip
relics.description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

relics.name: Permafrost
relics.description: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Pantograph
relics.description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: Razor Tooth
relics.description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Delicate Frond
relics.description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.name: Oddly Smooth Stone
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

ascension_effects.name: Scarcity
ascension_effects.description: Rare and Upgraded cards appear less often.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Large Capsule
relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold]. Add an additional [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: Meat on the Bone
relics.description: If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

relics.name: Bag of Preparation
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Gambling Chip
relics.description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

relics.name: Permafrost
relics.description: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Pantograph
relics.description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: Razor Tooth
relics.description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Delicate Frond
relics.description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.name: Oddly Smooth Stone
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Large Capsule
relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold]. Add an additional [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

relics.name: Meat on the Bone
relics.description: If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

relics.name: Bag of Preparation
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Gambling Chip
relics.description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

relics.name: Permafrost
relics.description: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.name: Pantograph
relics.description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: Razor Tooth
relics.description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Delicate Frond
relics.description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

relics.name: Oddly Smooth Stone
relics.description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

ascension_effects.name: Swarming Elites
ascension_effects.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] spawn more often.

ascension_effects.name: Weary Traveler
ascension_effects.description: Ancients only heal [blue]80%[/blue] of your missing HP.

ascension_effects.name: Poverty
ascension_effects.description: Enemies and Treasure Chests drop [blue]25%[/blue] less [gold]Gold[/gold].

ascension_effects.name: Tight Belt
ascension_effects.description: Start each run with 1 less potion slot.

ascension_effects.name: Ascender's Bane
ascension_effects.description: Start each run [red]Cursed[/red].

ascension_effects.name: Inflation
ascension_effects.description: Removing cards from your deck at the Merchant is more expensive.

ascension_effects.name: Scarcity
ascension_effects.description: Rare and Upgraded cards appear less often.

deck.line: Blade Dance [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Bouncing Flask [2]: Apply 3 Poison to a random enemy 3 times.
Bubble Bubble [1]: If the enemy has Poison, apply 9 Poison.
Dodge and Roll*2 [1]: Gain 4 Block. Next turn, gain 4 Block.
Expertise+ [1]: Draw cards until you have 7 in your Hand.
Nightmare+ [2]: Choose a card. Next turn, add 3 copies of that card into your Hand. Exhaust.
Noxious Fumes+ [1]: At the start of your turn, apply 3 Poison to ALL enemies.
Poisoned Stab [1]: Deal 6 damage. Apply 3 Poison.
Pounce [2]: Deal 12 damage. The next Skill you play costs 0 energy .
Tools of the Trade [1]: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
Well-Laid Plans+ [1]: At the end of your turn, Retain up to 2 cards.

glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

relics.description: If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Gambling Chip

relics.name: Permafrost
relics.description: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

relics.description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: Razor Tooth
relics.description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.

relics.name: Book of Five Rings
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

relics.name: Delicate Frond
relics.description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

deck.line: Blade Dance [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Bouncing Flask [2]: Apply 3 Poison to a random enemy 3 times.
Bubble Bubble [1]: If the enemy has Poison, apply 9 Poison.
Dodge and Roll*2 [1]: Gain 4 Block. Next turn, gain 4 Block.
Expertise+ [1]: Draw cards until you have 7 in your Hand.
Nightmare+ [2]: Choose a card. Next turn, add 3 copies of that card into your Hand. Exhaust.
Noxious Fumes+ [1]: At the start of your turn, apply 3 Poison to ALL enemies.
Poisoned Stab [1]: Deal 6 damage. Apply 3 Poison.
Pounce [2]: Deal 12 damage. The next Skill you play costs 0 energy .
Tools of the Trade [1]: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
Well-Laid Plans+ [1]: At the end of your turn, Retain up to 2 cards.

glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

deck.resolved_rules_text: Shivs gain Retain. The first Shiv you play each turn deals 9 additional damage.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Booming Conch
relics.description: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Joss Paper
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

relics.name: Girya
relics.description: You can now gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: White Beast Statue
relics.description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.

relics.name: Unsettling Lamp
relics.description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that [gold]Debuffs[/gold] an enemy, double its effect.

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue].

hand.line: Flick-Flack [1]: Sly. Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Ricochet [2]: Sly. Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.

draw.line: Dagger Throw [1]: Deal 9 damage. Draw 1 card. Discard 1 card.
Leading Strike [1]: Deal 3 damage. Add 2 Shivs into your Hand.

discard.line: Envenom+ [2]: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply 2 Poison.
Expertise+ [1]: Draw cards until you have 7 in your Hand.
Leg Sweep [2]: Apply 2 Weak. Gain 11 Block.

exhaust.line: Ascender's Bane [0]: Unplayable. Ethereal. Eternal.
Blade Dance*2 [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Expose [0]: Remove all Artifact and Block from the enemy. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Piercing Wail+*2 [1]: ALL enemies lose 8 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Shiv*6 [0]: Retain. Deal 4 damage. Exhaust.

ascension_effects.name: Swarming Elites
ascension_effects.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] spawn more often.

ascension_effects.name: Weary Traveler
ascension_effects.description: Ancients only heal [blue]80%[/blue] of your missing HP.

ascension_effects.name: Poverty
ascension_effects.description: Enemies and Treasure Chests drop [blue]25%[/blue] less [gold]Gold[/gold].

ascension_effects.name: Tight Belt
ascension_effects.description: Start each run with 1 less potion slot.

ascension_effects.name: Ascender's Bane
ascension_effects.description: Start each run [red]Cursed[/red].

ascension_effects.name: Inflation
ascension_effects.description: Removing cards from your deck at the Merchant is more expensive.

ascension_effects.name: Scarcity
ascension_effects.description: Rare and Upgraded cards appear less often.

ascension_effects.name: Tough Enemies
ascension_effects.description: All enemies are harder to kill.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

powers.name: Strength
powers.description: Strength adds additional damage to Attacks.

powers.name: Surrounded
powers.description: Receive 50% more damage if attacked from behind. Use targeting cards or potions to change your orientation.

powers.name: Thorns
powers.description: When hit by an attack, deal damage back.

powers.name: Dexterity
powers.description: Dexterity improves Block gained from cards.

powers.description: At the start of your turn, apply 2 Poison to ALL enemies.

powers.description: Shivs gain Retain. The first Shiv you play each turn deals 9 additional damage.

powers.name: Weak
powers.description: Weakened creatures deal 25% less damage with Attacks.

powers.name: Frail
powers.description: While Frail, gain 25% less Block from cards.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Booming Conch
relics.description: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Joss Paper
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

relics.name: Girya
relics.description: You can now gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: White Beast Statue
relics.description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.

relics.name: Unsettling Lamp
relics.description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that [gold]Debuffs[/gold] an enemy, double its effect.

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue].

hand.line: Leading Strike [1]: Deal 5 damage. Add 2 Shivs into your Hand.
Dagger Throw [1]: Deal 11 damage. Draw 1 card. Discard 1 card.
Expertise+ [1]: Draw cards until you have 7 in your Hand.

draw.line: Envenom+ [2]: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply 2 Poison.
Flick-Flack [1]: Sly. Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Leg Sweep [2]: Apply 2 Weak. Gain 11 Block.
Ricochet [2]: Sly. Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.

exhaust.line: Ascender's Bane [0]: Unplayable. Ethereal. Eternal.
Blade Dance*2 [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Expose [0]: Remove all Artifact and Block from the enemy. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Piercing Wail+*2 [1]: ALL enemies lose 8 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Shiv*6 [0]: Retain. Deal 4 damage. Exhaust.

ascension_effects.description: [gold]Elites[/gold] spawn more often.

ascension_effects.description: Start each run [red]Cursed[/red].

ascension_effects.name: Inflation
ascension_effects.description: Removing cards from your deck at the Merchant is more expensive.

ascension_effects.name: Scarcity
ascension_effects.description: Rare and Upgraded cards appear less often.

ascension_effects.name: Tough Enemies
ascension_effects.description: All enemies are harder to kill.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

deck.resolved_rules_text: Draw cards until you have 7 in your Hand.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Booming Conch
relics.description: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

relics.name: Joss Paper
relics.description: Every [blue]5[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

relics.name: Girya
relics.description: You can now gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

relics.name: Very Hot Cocoa
relics.description: Start each combat with an additional [blue]4[img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img][/blue].

relics.name: White Beast Statue
relics.description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.

relics.name: Unsettling Lamp
relics.description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that [gold]Debuffs[/gold] an enemy, double its effect.

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue].

hand.line: Envenom+ [2]: Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, apply 2 Poison.

draw.line: Leg Sweep [2]: Apply 2 Weak. Gain 11 Block.

discard.line: Dagger Throw [1]: Deal 9 damage. Draw 1 card. Discard 1 card.
Expertise+ [1]: Draw cards until you have 7 in your Hand.
Flick-Flack [1]: Sly. Deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Leading Strike [1]: Deal 3 damage. Add 2 Shivs into your Hand.
Ricochet [2]: Sly. Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.

exhaust.line: Ascender's Bane [0]: Unplayable. Ethereal. Eternal.
Blade Dance*2 [1]: Add 3 Shivs into your Hand. Exhaust.
Expose [0]: Remove all Artifact and Block from the enemy. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Piercing Wail+*2 [1]: ALL enemies lose 8 Strength this turn. Exhaust.
Shiv*6 [0]: Retain. Deal 4 damage. Exhaust.

glossary.Strength: Each stack of Strength typically adds 1 damage per attack hit.
glossary.Dexterity: Each stack of Dexterity typically adds 1 to Block gained.
glossary.Vulnerable: Vulnerable targets take more attack damage.
glossary.Weak: Weak targets deal less attack damage.
glossary.Block: Block absorbs incoming damage before HP is lost.
glossary.Exhaust: Exhausted cards are removed from this combat after being played.
glossary.Retain: Retain cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.
glossary.Poison: Poison deals equal HP loss at end of turn, then decreases by 1.

relics.description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/silent_energy_icon.png[/img] next turn.

relics.description: If you end your turn without [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
